name: cursor-skills-scripts
description: Scripts for cursor-skills: skill sync, link-fetcher.

scripts.test: node --test skills/test/sync.test.js link-fetcher/test/visited.test.js link-fetcher/test/link-filter.test.js link-fetcher/test/fetch.test.js link-fetcher/test/crawl.test.js link-fetcher/test/interactive.test.js
scripts.test:link-fetcher: node --test link-fetcher/test/visited.test.js link-fetcher/test/link-filter.test.js link-fetcher/test/fetch.test.js link-fetcher/test/crawl.test.js link-fetcher/test/interactive.test.js
scripts.test:coverage: node --experimental-test-coverage --test skills/test/sync.test.js link-fetcher/test/visited.test.js link-fetcher/test/link-filter.test.js link-fetcher/test/fetch.test.js link-fetcher/test/crawl.test.js link-fetcher/test/interactive.test.js
